title: AD88
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''AD88''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was scheduled to be repaired at [[Depot XLS]], but was attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] intending to destroy all the capital ships while they were at their weakest condition.

==Behind the scenes==
Whether or not ''AD88'' gets destroyed depends on the player's actions.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
